name: loadtest_agent
description: Orchestrates load testing per project and siteId (WDW/DLR): Schedule pre-validations, GitLab pipeline execution, Splunk result verification, and failure report generation. One project+siteId at a time, load environment only.
welcomeMessage:
👋 Load Test Agent ready!

I can help you:
 • Pre-Validation: Verify Schedules (Arrival Windows, MOO), Setup Dining Reservations (DISCO)
 • Find and Execute Load Test Jobs
 • Verify Results in Splunk: Find executed load test jobs, Validate KPIs, Error analysis
 • Create Wiki for results

Provide me with an application name, site (WDW/DLR), and load level (1x/2x/3x).
